productsAdd2.generalHint: Basic info shown on the product page and search results.
productsAdd2.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the product. Include materials, fit, sizing, and unique selling points.
productsAdd2.mediaHint: Upload up to 8 photos. The first image is used as the cover.
productsAdd2.continueSelling: Continue selling when out of stock
productsAdd2.wholesaleHint: Set MOQ and tier pricing for B2B buyers.
productsAdd2.tierHint: Set bulk-buy thresholds. The tier price (or % discount off the base price) is shown to buyers as a strike-through deal on the product page.
productsAdd2.specsHint: Key/value pairs (e.g. Material → 100% cotton). Shown on the Specifications tab of your product page.
productsAdd2.noVariantsNeeded: This category does not require variants. You can still add custom options if needed.
productsAdd2.tapToAdd: Tap suggestions or type your own.
productsAdd2.detailsHint: These descriptors appear on the product page so buyers know exactly what they're getting.
productsAdd2.creatorAffiliateHint: Let approved creators promote this product and earn commission on each verified sale.
productsAdd2.allowCreators: Allow creators to promote this product
productsAdd2.allowCreatorsDesc: Creators add this product to their feed and you only pay commission on verified sales.
productsAdd2.freeShippingDesc: A green "Free shipping" badge will appear on the product page.
productsAdd2.leadTimeHint: How long after payment until you ship. Shown as 'Lead Time' on the product page.
productsAdd2.returnsHint: Return window shown on the product page. Disable if you don't accept returns.
productsAdd2.acceptReturnsDesc: Buyers can request a return within the window below.
productsAdd2.conditionsPlaceholder: e.g. Item must be unopened and in original packaging.
productsAdd2.seoHint: How this product appears in Google and social shares.
productsAdd2.metaPlaceholder: Short summary that appears on search results.
productsAdd2.categoryResets: Switching the category resets the variant template below.
productsAdd2.needHelpDesc: Read our seller guide on writing titles, pricing for wholesale, and choosing the right variants.
productsAdd2.addOneImage: Add at least one product image.

productsEdit2.mediaUpTo8: Up to 8 photos. The first is the cover.

openshopStep2More.entityPlaceholder: Enter exactly as shown on license
openshopStep2More.entityNote: * This must match your official registration documents.
openshopStep2More.bankInfoDesc: Enter your shop's bank account information to receive payments. Please make sure the account name and account number are correct. This information will be used for withdrawals and settlements.
openshopStep2More.mainProductsDesc: Choose the category that best describes the products you sell. This will not affect your future business and will be used for registration purposes only.
openshopStep2More.secureDesc: To secure your account, we need your email and phone number for verification. This information will be used for screening. We recommend using a business email for better authentication.
openshopStep2More.currentEmailNote: This is the email currently linked to your account.
openshopStep2More.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

openshopStep3More.addressOptionsQ: Which option applies to the address you entered?
openshopStep3More.businessOnlyAddress: This is a business address only. I understand that my address will be displayed on the product details page.
openshopStep3More.alsoResidence: This is also my residence. I certify that I do not have a business-only address.

addressForm2.warehouseInfo: Warehouse address will be used for product pickup by shipping companies. You can add multiple addresses.
addressForm2.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this address?

shopDetailPanel2.approvedDesc: Your shop is verified and live.
shopDetailPanel2.pendingDesc: Our team is reviewing your submission. You'll be notified once approved.
shopDetailPanel2.rejectedDesc: Your KYC submission was rejected. See the reviewer note below.
shopDetailPanel2.lockedInfo: To update any of these details, please contact support — KYC information is locked once submitted to keep audit trails consistent.
